caption: A man with blond hair wearing a dark t-shirt and a headset sits in a room with a Christmas tree in the background, appearing in a small video overlay in the bottom-left corner. The main screen displays a purple background with the text "TOTW PRESENT" at the top. A dark, stylized card is centered on the screen, surrounded by glowing purple and green geometric accents. As the sequence progresses, the card opens to reveal a gold-themed player card, and the man in the overlay reacts with a surprised facial expression. The final scene shows a completed player card with a green glow and a player wearing a white jersey with the number 32. On-screen UI elements include buttons for "MARK/UNMARK", "DISMISS ALL", and "BACK", along with a top-right display showing "173,037", "14,600", "2,343,543", and "LVL 19".
